calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Consolidated with Case No. 416223 Cobb's Comedy Inc. vs. The Cannery, Case No. 419377 The San Francisco Cannery vs. National Metal Fabricators, Case No. 428022 Fireman's Fund Insurance vs. National Metal Fabricators, and Case No. 429219 Carlson vs. National Metal. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders Consolidated cases dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Lisa Sarto, CSR#8994. (212)
